Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That was harder than I expected, but the teacher needed our help, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You are stronger than you look, huh? Do you work out or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, are you on a sports team? Like baseball, or soccer? I think there's a track team too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'd like to join one too, but I guess they're not recruiting right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Or is it really something you can't tell me? Well, I hope you can let me in on the secret someday.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I noticed you're always wearing headphones. I take it you're really into music?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}How about I play you a song to break the ice between us? Sound good?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, don't be like that. It would be such a wasted opportunity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I thought if I impressed you, it might be a good way for us to hit it off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}There's so much that I'm not comfortable or familiar with yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}So I want to keep learning, and trying new things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I heard you transferred here too, back in spring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Seems like we have a thing or two in common. Do you think we can be friends?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Somehow, it already feels like we've known each other for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It does somehow feel like we've known each other for a long time already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, whatever you say. We're classmates, so I'll be counting on you either way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So, uh, what are we supposed to do in this situation?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, right. I think we exchange phone numbers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Why don't you just give me your contact info? I'll note it down and get back to you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Looks like we still have some time before it gets dark.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}How about you show me around the school? Just whatever parts you're familiar with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After giving Ryoji a tour of the[n]school, I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something about him[n]that lingers in my mind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All stats of the equipped Persona have been raised by 1.[n]{f 1 1}
